summary: Stripe billing MVP. New Prisma models (BillingCustomer, Subscription, Invoice, StripeWebhookEvent). Checkout + portal + webhooks. Pricing $20 Pro / $30 Team / Custom Enterprise. 90-day grace coupon for grandfathered auto-PRO users. 50% off year one for waitlist.
